subject: [CLAMP] Use mariadb galera common chart
commit_message:
[CLAMP] Use mariadb galera common chart

Instead of using "own" mariadb chart, reuse chart placed in common part
of OOM installation.
Will ease move to common galera cluster (which is not done by this
commit).

I didn't took specific conf of mariadb, please say if something is
important in it.

Change-Id: I93de3df09445b7cdfd8211c8321d80e03eea4167
Issue-ID: OOM-1219
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

Patch Set 8:

We may have an issue here, from what I have seen your mariadb version is  library/mariadb:10.1.38 ?
This is going to be a problem because Clamp absolutely needs a version >= 10.2.7 (we use JSON type)
Patch Set 8: Code-Review-1

Patch Set 8: Code-Review-1

mariadb version is library/mariadb:10.1.38 ?
This is going to be a problem because Clamp absolutely needs a version >= 10.2.7 (we use JSON type)

Patch Set 8: Code-Review-2

> Patch Set 8:
> 
> We may have an issue here, from what I have seen your mariadb version is  library/mariadb:10.1.38 ?
> This is going to be a problem because Clamp absolutely needs a version >= 10.2.7 (we use JSON type)

Oh you're such hipsters using "recent" versions of stuff, it's not ONAP compliant ;-)

mariadb:10.1.38 is only used for the clamp table onboarding so it would be easy to change (and I will).
__but__ common galera uses k8s-mariadb-galera-centos:v002 with relies on 10.1.24 :(

This version is quite old and a v004 exists but again it's based on 10.1.31...

So I'll take a look on moving on bitnami images that are a lot more recent (10.3, 10.2 are available...)

Putting this one on hold on the meantime
Set Work In Progress

Patch Set 8:

Ok Sylvain, sorry :-(
Anyway thank you for having done that first step migration for us.
Set Ready For Review

Patch Set 8:

no problem, here's a good reason to move to more recent (and more frequently build) releases ;)
